_comment: Budget raised 6656->8192 (6.5 KiB -> 8 KiB) when the plugin gained a `meta.icon` (single tree-shaken `Images` glyph from lucide-react, the same per-plugin-bundled convention as export-html/version-history/design-system). lucide-react is a regular dependency project-wide, not externalized, so the one icon lands in the entry chunk (~0.8 kB gzipped). Earlier the easy win was banked by sourcing the version from version.ts instead of importing the whole package.json. Raised again 8192->8704 (8 KiB -> 8.5 KiB) when the public surface gained `isResumableAdapter` (PRD 0004 §5.1 resumable/multipart upload contract): the interfaces are types (erased), but the narrowing helper is a runtime export that lands in the eager entry. The resumable runner (M3) and S3 resumable adapter (M4) ship in lazy subpath chunks (like ./providers/unsplash and ./adapters/s3), so the eager entry should not keep growing from PRD 0004. 8704 leaves modest headroom while still catching order-of-magnitude regressions.
